_metadata.title: ComplianceLint Interim Standard for EU AI Act Article 55: Obligations for Providers of GPAI Models with Systemic Risk
_metadata.disclaimer: This is an interim standard developed by ComplianceLint. It will be superseded by the CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard.
basis: NIST AI 600-1 (AI Risk Management Framework: GPAI)
EU AI Office Code of Practice for systemic risk GPAI
_metadata.awaiting_standard: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for Art. 55 (expected Q4 2026)

requirements.title: Model Evaluation and Adversarial Testing
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST perform model evaluation including adversarial testing to identify and mitigate systemic risks.
requirements.rationale: Art. 55(1)(a) mandates state-of-the-art evaluations and adversarial testing for systemic risk models.
acceptable_implementations: Red-team evaluation programme with documented methodology and findings
Automated adversarial testing suite covering known attack vectors
Third-party model evaluation against NIST AI 600-1 risk categories

requirements.title: Systemic Risk Assessment and Mitigation
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST assess and mitigate possible systemic risks at Union level, including their sources.
requirements.rationale: Art. 55(1)(b) requires identification and mitigation of systemic risks that may arise at Union level.
acceptable_implementations: Systemic risk assessment report with identified risks and mitigation measures
Risk register covering dual-use, misuse, and cascading failure scenarios
Periodic risk review process with documented mitigation actions

requirements.title: Serious Incident Reporting
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST track, document, and report serious incidents and possible corrective measures to the AI Office and national competent authorities without undue delay.
requirements.rationale: Art. 55(1)(c) mandates incident tracking and reporting for systemic risk models.
acceptable_implementations: Incident response plan with reporting workflow to AI Office
Incident tracking system with severity classification and escalation procedures
Automated incident detection with regulatory notification pipeline

requirements.title: Cybersecurity Protections
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST ensure an adequate level of cybersecurity protection for the GPAI model with systemic risk and the physical infrastructure of the model.
requirements.rationale: Art. 55(1)(d) requires cybersecurity measures for both the model and its infrastructure.
acceptable_implementations: Cybersecurity framework implementation aligned with ISO 27001 or NIST CSF
Model security measures including access controls, weight protection, and API security
Infrastructure security programme covering physical and logical protections

scoring.partial: R01 + R02 met, R03 or R04 incomplete
